# Recursive Thinking

$$\begin{array}{lll}
\text{Recursion}&&\text{Fuction which calls itself in its function definition block}
\end{array}$$

```python
def main():
    print("H", end="")
    main()
    
    
if __name__ == "__main__":
    main()
```

**Output:**
```

```
